list.value:
# Create proper krb5.conf for king.htb cat > /tmp/krb5_king.conf << 'KEOF' [libdefaults] default_realm = KING.HTB dns_lookup_realm = false dns_lookup_kdc = false udp_preference_limit = 0 [realms] KING.HTB = { kdc = 172.16.1.1 admin_server = 172.16.1.1 } [domain_realm] .king.htb = KING.HTB king.htb = KING.HTB KEOF
echo "=KRB5_TEST="; KRB5_CONFIG=/tmp/krb5_king.conf KRB5CCNAME=/tmp/krb5cc_1600801117_Qxs0zd klist 2>&1
echo "=LDAP_ANONYMOUS="; ldapsearch -x -H ldap://172.16.1.1 -b "dc=king,dc=htb" "(objectClass=user)" sAMAccountName 2>&1 | head -30
echo "=LDAP_GSSAPI="; KRB5_CONFIG=/tmp/krb5_king.conf KRB5CCNAME=/tmp/krb5cc_1600801117_Qxs0zd ldapsearch -Y GSSAPI -H ldap://172.16.1.1 -b "dc=king,dc=htb" "(objectClass=user)" sAMAccountName userPrincipalName memberOf 2>&1 | head -80
echo "=LDAP_SIMPLE="; KRB5_CONFIG=/tmp/krb5_king.conf KRB5CCNAME=/tmp/krb5cc_1600801117_Qxs0zd ldapsearch -H ldap://172.16.1.1 -b "dc=king,dc=htb" -D "svc_mq@king.htb" -W "(objectClass=user)" 2>&1 | head -20
